subject.title: Current-main replacement for PR #4468 stale-heartbeat live-agent safety
subject.author: marvincris / Marvin Cris Andrade

action_plan.summary: Carry PR #4468's stale-heartbeat live-agent safety forward on current main while preserving marvincris attribution. Tighten only the existing tmux liveness/polecat kill predicate seam by adding checked liveness errors, fail closed on query errors or nil tmux, and add focused stale-heartbeat live/not-live/query-error regressions. No retries, no longer timeouts, and no second liveness layer.

artifacts.summary: Replacement target semantics: status=merge-ready, priority=p1, kind=bug. Original PR #4468 remains status/needs-review and is not the merge target.
Original PR #4468 by marvincris is open, kind/bug priority/p1 status/needs-review, no reviews/approval, head 4fabb623753677b514e125c846f0bd7c0781aa17, and base f8e6d072 is stale versus current main.

Current-main replacement commit d3858c3c91c3bee3252b1095551af5579bc07f34 on upstream/main 62fc77c7; trailers reference PR #4468, original commit 4fabb623, mayor <marvincris@outlook.com>, and Claude Fable 5.
Focused polecat stale-heartbeat tests, focused tmux checked-runtime tests, full internal/polecat with CGO_ENABLED=0, CGO_ENABLED=0 go build ./cmd/gt, and git diff --check passed on d3858c3c.
The two broad internal/tmux local failures (sleep reported as coreutils) reproduce on clean upstream/main 62fc77c7, proving unrelated local baseline behavior.
Checker output persisted after evidence generation.
Problem validity: stale heartbeat alone is not proof of death, but PR #4468 as-is still treats IsAgentAlive false/query-error as dead.
Existing tests lacked stale heartbeat plus live agent, not-live agent, and query-error regressions; a narrow liveness seam is sufficient.
tmux.IsAgentAlive returns bool only and collapses tmux/pane/process query failures to false; checked semantics are needed for destructive cleanup.
Original PR base was stale but the touched hunk did not conflict with then-current main; final replacement was later rebased to 62fc77c7.
Cleanup-first review favored tightening the existing predicate and checked liveness errors, not retries/timeouts or another liveness layer.
Attribution evidence: PR #4468 author marvincris / Marvin Cris Andrade; original commit author mayor <marvincris@outlook.com> with Claude co-author.
Original labels have valid cardinality but status/needs-review and no review approval block merge-as-is.
CI was green on stale original head but missing focused regressions; local environment needs CGO_ENABLED=0 because ICU headers are absent.
Blocker scan confirmed missing approval, stale current-main verification, missing focused tests, and unresolved false-on-query-error semantics.
Testability review recommended a narrow package-level liveness seam plus checked tmux helper, not a broad Manager abstraction.
No-heartbeat sessions should retain legacy PID fallback; stale heartbeat with liveness-query uncertainty should return not-dead.
Operational safety favors preserving uncertain live sessions over false-positive kills; false negatives are less destructive than killing active work.
Historical context from GH#3342 and daemon idle-reap protections supports stale-heartbeat plus live-agent preservation but requires fail-closed query semantics.
Evidence schema review identified required 15+5+5 records, merge-ready labels, replacement flow, attribution, blocker scan, verification, and checker output.
Final disposition review recommended sheriff replacement/fixup rather than merge-as-is, with current-main rebase, tests, attribution, and checker evidence.
Approved cleanup-first plan: checked liveness, stale heartbeat fail-closed, focused tests, no retries/timeouts/layers.
Approved correctness and operational safety plan for isSessionProcessDead and reuse/state behavior.
Approved unit-level liveness seam and explicit query-error fail-closed regression.
Approved API-compatible checked tmux method while preserving bool IsAgentAlive callers.
Approved policy path for kind/bug replacement with marvincris attribution and post-review/checker gates.
Approved cleanup-first final head d3858c3c: tightens predicate, no retries/timeouts/layers, attribution preserved.
Approved correctness final head d3858c3c: stale live/not-live/query-error, nil tmux, PID fallback, and descendant fallback behavior are safe.
Approved verification sufficiency; local tmux full-test failures are baseline/unrelated and focused checks pass.
Approved API compatibility: checked helpers preserve errors, bool wrappers remain compatible, and process-match errors still allow descendant fallback.
Approved policy/attribution final head; merge promotion still requires durable evidence and checker pass.

research_legs.lens: problem validity and exact kill predicate
research_legs.summary: Stale heartbeat alone is not proof of death; PR #4468 intent is valid but bool IsAgentAlive query-error semantics block merge-as-is.
Focused live/not-live/query-error regressions are missing and needed.
IsAgentAlive false conflates absence and query failure; checked liveness is needed.
Original branch was stale but conflict risk low; final branch must rebase onto current main.
Minimal fix should tighten existing predicate and checked liveness, not add timeout/retry layers.
Preserve marvincris/mayor attribution and original Claude co-author when carrying forward.
Original status/needs-review and no approval block merge-as-is.
Original CI is stale and tests missing; final needs focused tests and CGO_ENABLED=0 local verification.
Approval, stale base, tests, and query-error semantics are unresolved on original PR.
Use narrow liveness seam and checked tmux helper, not broad abstractions.
Keep no-heartbeat PID fallback; stale query uncertainty should fail closed to not-dead.
False-positive kills are higher blast radius than retaining uncertain stale sessions.
GH#3342/daemon idle-reap history supports live-agent preservation and fail-closed uncertainty.
Final evidence requires 15+5+5, replacement flow, attribution, verification, blocker scan, and checker.
Recommend current-main sheriff replacement/fixup instead of merge-as-is.

pre_implementation_reviews.summary: Approved focused test plan and query-error regression.

post_implementation_reviews.summary: Approved final tests and verification sufficiency.
Approved final policy and attribution, pending checker evidence.

cleanup_first.rationale: The replacement tightens the existing stale-heartbeat dead-session predicate and existing tmux runtime matcher with checked errors. It does not add retry loops, longer timeouts, or a second liveness layer.

focused_checks.name: polecat-focused-stale-heartbeat
focused_checks.reason: Fresh, stale/live, stale/not-live, stale/query-error, and stale/no-tmux fail-closed regressions passed.

focused_checks.name: tmux-focused-checked-liveness
focused_checks.reason: Checked liveness, bool wrapper compatibility, and runtime detection regressions passed.

focused_checks.name: polecat-package
focused_checks.reason: Full touched polecat package passed with CGO disabled for local ICU constraint.

focused_checks.name: build
focused_checks.reason: CLI builds with CGO disabled in local environment.

focused_checks.name: local-baseline-tmux
focused_checks.reason: Baseline proof passed as unrelatedness evidence: the same two local failures reproduce on clean upstream/main.

evidence_reuse.rationale: The valid bug intent from PR #4468 was carried forward, but final checked liveness semantics, tests, and current-main verification are fresh on upstream/main 62fc77c7.

attribution.required_reason: Replacement preserves the accepted stale-heartbeat live-agent safety intent from PR #4468 by marvincris.

blocker_scan.summary: Original PR #4468 remains blocked for merge-as-is by status/needs-review, no approval, stale original head, missing tests, and bool query-error semantics. Replacement head d3858c3c resolves the implementation/test/query-error blockers, is current-main based, and has no unresolved blockers after final post-review and verification.

final.reason: Original PR #4468 is not mergeable as-is. The current-main replacement passes 15 research legs, 5 pre-implementation reviews, 5 final-head post-implementation reviews, cleanup-first, attribution, blocker scan, focused verification, and build gates.
required_actions: Do not close PR #4468 as superseded until the replacement lands with attribution evidence.
